creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jadawin
Date: Fri Nov 22 10:05:28 2013
New Revision: 334567
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/334567

Log:
  - Update to 3.0.4
  
  PR:		ports/184017
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/Makefile
  head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/distinfo
  head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/pkg-plist

Modified: head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/Makefile	Fri Nov 22 10:00:08 2013	(r334566)
+++ head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/Makefile	Fri Nov 22 10:05:28 2013	(r334567)
@@ -2,9 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	portsreinstall
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.3
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.4
 CATEGORIES=	ports-mgmt
-MASTER_SITES=	SFJP/${PORTNAME}/59240/ \
+MASTER_SITES=	SFJP/${PORTNAME}/59894/ \
 		http://www.mwghennndo.com/software/${PORTNAME}/
 
 MAINTAINER=	sakaue.mamoru@samurai.mwghennn.net
@@ -13,9 +13,8 @@ COMMENT=	Ports upgrading utility for mas
 LICENSE=	BSD
 
 MAN8=		${PORTNAME}.8
-MANCOMPRESSED=	yes
+MAKE_ARGS=	PREFIX=${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-install:
 	@${ECHO_MSG} "====================================================================="
 	@${ECHO_MSG} "This software invokes some installed files of portupgrade(1)"
